Title: Create AppUser table
Description: Create AppUser table per data model spec: Id, AdAccount, DisplayName, ClockNumber, PinHash, IgnitionRole, CreatedAt, DeprecatedAt.

Title: Create Audit schema tables
Description: Create LogSeverity, LogEventType, LogEntityType, ConfigLog, OperationLog, InterfaceLog tables in Audit schema per data model spec.

Title: Seed audit lookup tables
Description: Insert seed rows for LogSeverity (Info/Warning/Error/Critical), LogEventType (initial set), LogEntityType (one row per entity table).

Title: Insert bootstrap AppUser row
Description: Direct INSERT of Id=1 system.bootstrap user via migration script (not via AppUser_Create). Breaks chicken-and-egg with @AppUserId attribution.

Title: Write Audit_LogConfigChange proc
Description: Shared proc called by every Create/Update/Deprecate in all later phases. Writes to Audit.ConfigLog.
Notes: Critical cross-cutting dependency for all later phases

Title: Write Audit_LogOperation proc
Description: Shared proc for Plant Floor mutations. Writes to Audit.OperationLog. Not used by Configuration Tool directly but defined here for the future Arc 2 build.

Title: Write Audit_LogInterfaceCall proc
Description: Shared proc for external system calls (AIM/Zebra/Macola). Writes to Audit.InterfaceLog. Supports FRS 3.17.4 high-fidelity toggle.

Title: Write AppUser CRUD procs
Description: 8 procs: _List, _Get, _GetByAdAccount, _GetByClockNumber, _Create, _Update, _SetPin, _Deprecate. All mutating procs call Audit_LogConfigChange.

Title: Write audit lookup List procs
Description: Read-only procs: LogSeverity_List, LogEventType_List, LogEntityType_List.

Title: Write ConfigLog read procs
Description: ConfigLog_List (paged/filterable) and ConfigLog_GetByEntity for audit history per entity.

Title: Configure Phase 1 Named Queries
Description: Configure Ignition Named Queries wrapping all Phase 1 stored procs.

Title: Build User Management Perspective view
Description: Admin-only view. List with active/deprecated filter. Add/Edit/Deprecate modals. Role dropdown.

Title: Build PIN Reset flow
Description: Self-service or admin. Hash client-side before calling AppUser_SetPin.

Title: Build Audit Log Browser
Description: Filterable view of Audit.ConfigLog. Entity/user/date filters. Row expansion shows old/new diff.

Title: Phase 1 integration testing
Description: End-to-end: create admin user, change a user, verify audit log entries, reset a PIN. Gate for Phase 2.

Title: Create Location schema tables
Description: LocationType, LocationTypeDefinition, LocationAttributeDefinition, Location, LocationAttribute per data model spec.

Title: Seed LocationType and initial definitions
Description: 5 LocationType rows. ~15 LocationTypeDefinition rows. ~20 LocationAttributeDefinition rows covering Terminal, DieCastMachine, CNCMachine, etc.

Title: Seed plant root hierarchy
Description: 1 Enterprise (MPP Inc.), 1 Site (Madison), 5 Areas (Die Cast, Trim Shop, Machine Shop, Production Control, Quality Control).

Title: Write LocationType procs
Description: Read-only: LocationType_List, LocationType_Get.

Title: Write LocationTypeDefinition CRUD procs
Description: 5 procs: _List, _Get, _Create, _Update, _Deprecate. Mutating procs call Audit_LogConfigChange.

Title: Write LocationAttributeDefinition CRUD procs
Description: 5 procs scoped to parent definition. _ListByDefinition, _Get, _Create, _Update, _Deprecate.

Title: Write Location CRUD and tree query procs
Description: 8 procs including recursive CTEs: _List, _GetTree, _GetAncestors, _GetDescendantsOfType, _Get, _Create, _Update, _Deprecate.
Notes: Recursive CTE queries may need performance tuning

Title: Write LocationAttribute procs
Description: 3 procs: _GetByLocation, _Set (upsert), _Clear. _Set validates definition belongs to location kind.

Title: Write Location_BulkLoadMachinesFromSeed proc
Description: Accepts CSV blob. Parses machines.csv rows. Maps MachDesc patterns to LocationTypeDefinitions. Calls Location_Create per row.

Title: Configure Phase 2 Named Queries
Description: Configure Ignition Named Queries wrapping all Phase 2 stored procs.

Title: Build Plant Hierarchy Browser view
Description: Tree component showing Enterprise->Site->Area->WorkCenter->Cell. Click node to load details.

Title: Build Location Details Panel
Description: Right drawer. Dynamic attribute form rendered from LocationAttributeDefinition set. Save calls _Update and _Set per changed attribute.

Title: Build Add Location Modal
Description: Triggered from tree context menu. Dropdown filtered to valid child kinds. Calls Location_Create.

Title: Build Location Type Definition Editor
Description: Engineering only. List of definitions grouped by LocationType. Embedded sub-table for LocationAttributeDefinition rows.

Title: Build Bulk Seed Loader screen
Description: One-time-use. Upload CSV, preview, map process patterns to definitions, trigger bulk load.

Title: Load machines.csv seed data
Description: Run the bulk loader or call Location_BulkLoadMachinesFromSeed with machines.csv (209 rows).
Notes: Review ~35 partial rows from parse_warnings.md with MPP first

Title: Phase 2 integration testing
Description: Verify tree navigation, attribute editing, audit trail. Gate for Phase 3.

Title: Create reference lookup tables
Description: Uom, ItemType, LotOriginType, LotStatusCode, ContainerStatusCode, GenealogyRelationshipType, OperationStatus, WorkOrderStatus.

Title: Seed reference lookup data
Description: Seed all fixed-value rows per data model spec. UOMs (EA/LB/KG/etc), ItemTypes (Raw Material/Component/etc), status codes.

Title: Write read-only lookup procs
Description: _List and _Get for 6 fixed tables: LotOriginType, LotStatusCode, ContainerStatusCode, GenealogyRelationshipType, OperationStatus, WorkOrderStatus.

Title: Write mutable lookup CRUD procs
Description: Uom and ItemType full CRUD (5 procs each). Mutating procs call Audit_LogConfigChange.

Title: Configure Phase 3 Named Queries
Description: Ignition Named Queries for all Phase 3 procs.

Title: Build Reference Data Manager view
Description: Single tabbed view with grid per lookup table. Read-only tables show disabled Add button.

Title: Phase 3 integration testing
Description: Verify lookups load, CRUD works for Uom/ItemType, audit entries recorded. Gate for Phases 4-8.

Title: Create Item and ContainerConfig tables
Description: Item (with ItemType/Uom FKs) and ContainerConfig (one per finished good).

Title: Write Item CRUD procs
Description: 6 procs: _List, _Get, _GetByPartNumber, _Create, _Update, _Deprecate. Mutating procs call Audit_LogConfigChange.

Title: Write ContainerConfig procs
Description: 4 procs: _GetByItem, _Create, _Update, _Deprecate.
Notes: Note OI-02 may add ClosureMethod and TargetWeight fields

Title: Configure Phase 4 Named Queries
Description: Ignition Named Queries for Phase 4 procs.

Title: Build Item Master List view
Description: Filterable/searchable table. Columns: PartNumber/Desc/Type/Uom/Macola/Weight/SubLotQty.

Title: Build Item Editor form
Description: Form with tabs for Container Config, BOM (Phase 6 link), Routes (Phase 5 link), Quality Specs (Phase 7 link), Audit History.

Title: Build Container Config sub-tab
Description: Embedded in Item Editor. Enabled only for finished goods.

Title: Build reusable Item Picker component
Description: Modal or inline picker used throughout BOMs/routes/eligibility. Searchable by part number or description.

Title: Load initial item master
Description: Manual entry or bulk load if MPP has an Excel export. Create ContainerConfig rows for finished goods.
Notes: Confirm with MPP whether there is an existing item master export

Title: Phase 4 integration testing
Description: Verify item CRUD, container config linkage, search/filter. Gate for Phases 5-7.

Title: Create Routes and Operations tables
Description: RouteTemplate, RouteStep, OperationTemplate, ItemLocation tables.

Title: Write OperationTemplate procs
Description: 5 versioned procs. _List, _Get, _Create, _CreateNewVersion, _Deprecate.

Title: Write RouteTemplate procs
Description: 6 versioned procs. _ListByItem, _Get, _GetActiveForItem, _Create, _CreateNewVersion, _Deprecate.

Title: Write RouteStep procs
Description: 5 procs including _Reorder (drag-drop support via comma-delimited StepIds).

Title: Write ItemLocation eligibility procs
Description: 4 procs: _ListByItem, _ListByLocation, _Add, _Remove.

Title: Configure Phase 5 Named Queries
Description: Ignition Named Queries for Phase 5 procs.

Title: Build Operation Template Library view
Description: List grouped by Area. Add/edit with data collection flag toggles. Version history per template.

Title: Build Route Builder view
Description: Master-detail per item. Ordered step list with drag-drop reorder. New Version button preserves old.
Notes: High complexity due to drag-drop and versioning

Title: Build Eligibility Map Editor
Description: Items on left, Locations on right, matrix in center. Click to toggle. Filter by area or part type.

Title: Build Operation Template Editor
Description: Form with data collection flag switches. Area dropdown filtered to Area-tier locations.

Title: Populate routes for all active items
Description: Create a RouteTemplate and RouteStep rows for every MPP item. Data entry task.

Title: Populate eligibility map
Description: Create ItemLocation rows for every item-cell combination MPP runs.

Title: Phase 5 integration testing
Description: Verify route versioning, step reorder, eligibility validation. Operators should see routes and eligible cells.

Title: Create Bom and BomLine tables
Description: Bom header (versioned) and BomLine (child item/qty).

Title: Write Bom procs
Description: 6 versioned procs. _ListByParentItem, _Get, _GetActiveForItem, _Create, _CreateNewVersion (copies lines), _Deprecate.

Title: Write BomLine procs
Description: 4 procs: _ListByBom, _Add, _Update, _Remove.

Title: Configure Phase 6 Named Queries
Description: Ignition Named Queries for Phase 6 procs.

Title: Build BOM Editor view
Description: Master-detail tied to Item. Version selector. Editable grid for BomLine. New Version button.

Title: Build BOM Comparison view
Description: Side-by-side diff of two versions. Line-level added/removed/changed.

Title: Build Where-Used Report view
Description: "Show me every BOM using this child item." Useful for deprecation impact.

Title: Populate BOMs for assembled products
Description: Create Bom+BomLine rows for every MPP assembled product. Data entry.

Title: Phase 6 integration testing
Description: Verify BOM versioning, comparison, where-used. Verify active version query works as-of a date.

Title: Create Quality and DefectCode tables
Description: QualitySpec, QualitySpecVersion, QualitySpecAttribute, DefectCode tables.

Title: Write QualitySpec procs
Description: 4 procs: _List, _Get, _Create, _Deprecate.

Title: Write QualitySpecVersion procs
Description: 5 versioned procs. _ListBySpec, _GetActive, _Create, _CreateNewVersion (copies attributes), _Deprecate.

Title: Write QualitySpecAttribute procs
Description: 4 procs: _ListByVersion, _Add, _Update, _Remove.

Title: Write DefectCode procs
Description: 6 procs: _List, _Get, _Create, _Update, _Deprecate, _BulkLoadFromSeed.

Title: Configure Phase 7 Named Queries
Description: Ignition Named Queries for Phase 7 procs.

Title: Build Quality Spec Library view
Description: List of specs filterable by item or operation. Click to open editor.

Title: Build Quality Spec Editor view
Description: Master-detail with version selector. Editable attribute grid. New Version button.

Title: Build Defect Code Manager view
Description: List grouped by area. Add/edit/deprecate. Bulk-load button (one-time).

Title: Load defect_codes.csv
Description: Run _BulkLoadFromSeed with reference/seed_data/defect_codes.csv (153 rows).

Title: Create quality specs for high-volume items
Description: Engineering creates QualitySpec + QualitySpecVersion + attributes for top items.

Title: Phase 7 integration testing
Description: Verify spec versioning, defect code CRUD, bulk load.

Title: Create Downtime and Shift tables
Description: DowntimeReasonType, DowntimeReasonCode, ShiftSchedule tables.

Title: Seed DowntimeReasonType rows
Description: 6 fixed rows: Equipment, Miscellaneous, Mold, Quality, Setup, Unscheduled.

Title: Write DowntimeReasonType_List proc
Description: Single read-only proc.

Title: Write DowntimeReasonCode procs
Description: 6 procs: _List, _Get, _Create, _Update, _Deprecate, _BulkLoadFromSeed.

Title: Write ShiftSchedule procs
Description: 5 procs: _List, _Get, _Create, _Update, _Deprecate.

Title: Configure Phase 8 Named Queries
Description: Ignition Named Queries for Phase 8 procs.

Title: Build Downtime Reason Code Manager view
Description: List grouped by area with type filter. Add/edit/deprecate. Bulk-load button. Flag untyped rows.

Title: Build Shift Schedule Editor
Description: List of schedules with start/end, days-of-week, effective date. Calendar preview for next 2 weeks.

Title: Build OPC Tag Reference view
Description: Read-only browser of opc_tags.csv. Loads CSV directly. Not a SQL table.
Notes: No Phase 8 proc dependency — reads CSV file

Title: Load downtime_reason_codes.csv
Description: Run _BulkLoadFromSeed with reference/seed_data/downtime_reason_codes.csv (353 rows).

Title: Engineering review of untyped downtime codes
Description: Per parse_warnings.md: ~25 rows have empty TypeId. Engineering assigns types before go-live.

Title: Configure standard shift schedules
Description: Create First Shift, Second Shift, Weekend OT schedule rows.

Title: Phase 8 integration testing
Description: Verify downtime code CRUD, bulk load, shift schedule editor.

Title: End-to-end cross-phase testing
Description: Full Configuration Tool walkthrough. Create an item, build a BOM, define a route, run the eligibility map, verify everything links.

Title: Ignition project packaging
Description: Package the Ignition project with all Named Queries, Perspective views, roles, and session config.

Title: Engineering user acceptance testing
Description: MPP engineering does a UAT pass. Any gaps get fed back into a remediation list.

Title: Configuration Tool handoff documentation
Description: Short operator guide for engineering users plus admin runbook (user management, PIN resets, audit log queries).
